95 I1W I1W_M_S 25e(I1w)Multiple Sclerosis CHAR 1 Indicates a diagnosis of Multiple Sclerosis - a chronic disease affecting the central nervous system with remissions and relapses of weakness, uncoordination, paresthesis, speed disturbances, and visual disturbances. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
